title: PlayerHeads
body: # PlayerHeads Players heads drop after death ## Important At the moment the plugin is at the development stage. That is why the logic of its work may change in the process of finalization. If you have errors, please contact [issues](https://github.com/orewaee/PlayerHeads/issues) for help. ## Config You have the opportunity to specify the chance of a head drop. After changing this file, use the `/playerheads reloaod` command to reload the config. ```toml [drop] # Chance of dropping a head from a player. Please note that this value is in the range [1, 100]. # If an incorrect value is specified, a chance of 100 will be used. chance = 100 ``` This idea was suggested by one of the plugin users. You can participate in the development by joining our community on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/p2QcD2856M) server. ## Preview
